attributes.action: Stop WW1 Medals being melted down for scrap value
attributes.background: GB News has advised that unscrupulous scrap metal dealers are melting down WW1 Heroes medals for the scrap silver value. This MUST be made illegal.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make the destruction or scrapping of UK military medals a criminal offence
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759185
